gaps: A structured scope marker explaining why a pre-modern SCOTUS merits record remains eligible for a petition-disposition prediction would reduce ambiguity.
helpful: Resolved paths identified the event and snapshot locations.
Base-rate statistics calibrated the low grant probability.
Corpus query showed comparable sparse SCOTUS records are often historical or excluded records.
notes: The available tooling was enough to produce a conservative forecast, but the event appears to need scope triage rather than more legal research.
